heading: Organization
label: 153101 Organization
text: The National Society of the Daughters of the American Revolution (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a body corporate and politic in the District of Columbia.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15310136:18 (words before “for patriotic”).(words before “for patriotic”), .Feb. 20, 1896, ch. 23, § 129 Stat. 8This section is substituted for the source provision for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate executed and unnecessary words.
